environment.authority: source_commit identifies the commit containing benchmark code and data; the authoritative baseline tag points to the later manifest-only commit.

included: pinned Dockerfile and Python package metadata
excluded: any path whose basename case-insensitively equals README.md
run artifacts, caches, logs, and local environment files

hash_strategy.json: Canonical UTF-8 JSON with sorted object keys; array order and numeric types are preserved.
hash_strategy.text: UTF-8 text normalized from CRLF/CR to LF before SHA-256.
